title: Hallucination Failure Detected — agt-mortgage-faq-001
description: During evaluation of agent 'agt-mortgage-faq-001', ThirdLine detected 5 interaction(s) that failed the hallucination evaluation dimension. This constitutes a failure of control CTRL-001 — AI Output Groundedness and Factual Accuracy, which requires adherence to the 'Conceptual Soundness' principle. The average evaluation score for this dimension was 0.81 (threshold: 0.75). The most significant failure had a score of 0.15. Specific evidence: Deterministic check: output contains known hallucination signature 'minimum credit score of 700'. This fact was not in the retrieved context and does not appear in public mortgage guidelines.. This finding requires review by a human auditor before finalisation.
evidence_summary: 5 of 50 interactions failed the hallucination evaluation. Average score: 0.81. Minimum score: 0.15.
recommended_action: 1. Identify the specific hallucinated claim and its interaction context. 2. Review the agent's system prompt and retrieved context for gaps. 3. Add explicit instructions against speculation. 4. Consider adding a post-generation fact-check layer. 5. Re-evaluate after prompt changes.
